title: Meridian Fitness App
subtitle: Cross-platform fitness app rebuild.
description: Led the front-end rebuild of Meridian's consumer fitness app, replacing two diverging native codebases with a single React Native architecture and a shared component library. Drove a full accessibility pass to WCAG-AA and shipped a redesigned onboarding flow that measurably improved activation.
scope: Front-end rebuild — design system, cross-platform unification, accessibility, and onboarding redesign.
resumeBullets: Rebuilt Meridian's fitness app front end on a single React Native codebase, retiring two diverging native apps and cutting feature delivery time across iOS and Android.
Established a shared component library and design tokens, aligning design and engineering on one source of truth.
Led a WCAG-AA accessibility pass covering navigation, contrast, and screen-reader support across the core experience.
Redesigned and shipped the onboarding flow, improving new-user activation.

testimonial.quote: Sam brought clarity to a messy codebase and shipped fast.
testimonial.author: Engineering Manager
